channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Pregnancy & Reproductive Health
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Pregnancy & Reproductive Health

item.title: Gallstones: Physiopathology and treatment of cholelithiasis (part 1).
item.description: Journal of visceral surgery - Review - Cholelithiasis (gallstones) is a frequent disease, with an estimated annual risk of 1 to 4% of presenting clinical manifestations. It mainly results from imbalanced bile composition: cholesterol ov...

item.title: Autoimmune diseases and risk of adverse pregnancy outcomes: a population-based cohort study of five million pregnancies in the UK.
item.description: BMC medicine - With an increasing trend in the prevalence of maternal autoimmune diseases in pregnancy, there is need for evidence on the association between autoimmune diseases and pregnancy outcomes. This popul...

item.title: Human inflammatory bowel disease-on-a-chip for modelling disease progression, cancer initiation and sex-specific effects.
item.description: Nature biomedical engineering - Patients affected by inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) exhibit compromised intestinal barrier function and decreased mucus accumulation, as well as increased inflammation, fibrosis and cancer risk, ...

item.title: A case report of miliary tuberculosis diagnosed in the peripartum period.
item.description: Obstetric medicine - We report a rare case of miliary tuberculosis (TB) diagnosed in the peripartum period in a 38-year-old woman with a background of Crohn's disease who was on immunosuppressive therapy. This case hig...
